sessions.summary: Prepared double match day for Saturday. Optimized starting XI from OVR 79.1 to 86.0 by promoting Alinejad (ST 95), Niv (MC 89), and Zak (DC 72) from bench/reserves. Set tactics for HerthaMahlow (unattended) and CF Cholargós (live). Failed auction bids on MC/MR targets — strategy: save tokens to 15-20 for next cycle.

Designed 5-agent personal finance system via 3 rounds of LLM Council. Analyzed RiseUp CSV (5,163 transactions), Mislaka Pensionit (1.82M across 14 products), HaTmuna HaMleia (deposits). Council rejected skills.sh and raw CFO gym. Spec approved with 6 critical fixes (formula, tax modeling, conflicts, staleness). Architecture: self-contained repo, JSON data layer, 4 parallel agents + synthesizer. Ready for subagent-driven build.

Redesigned Obsidian vault architecture from journal-as-hub to concept-first. Ran LLM Council for architecture validation and spec review. Shipped /wrap v2.0.0 with concept-first write order, SESSION_ID idempotency, and canonical Current State schema.
